mapper.select: SELECT ORDER_ID , ITEM_ID , ITEM_ORDER_COUNT , ITEM_UNIT_PRICE , ORDER_AMOUNT_PRICE , USER_ID , TO_CHAR(CREATE_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_AT FROM ORDERS WHERE ORDER_ID = #{_parameter}
SELECT ORDER_ID , ITEM_ID , ITEM_ORDER_COUNT , ITEM_UNIT_PRICE , ORDER_AMOUNT_PRICE , USER_ID , TO_CHAR(CREATE_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_AT FROM ORDERS WHERE USER_ID = #{_parameter}
